name: ask-johnny
description: A Discord bot. Johnny is dry, deadpan, and grudgingly competent — he remembers things, sets reminders, settles arguments, and tells you the real weather, all like it cost him effort. Powered by Groq.

comments.overrides: discord.js pins undici to 6.24.1, which carries 4 known advisories (GHSA-p88m-4jfj-68fv et al). Force the patched 6.27.x until discord.js bumps it upstream. Safe: same undici major.
